compiled_state.title: Create prefill-config.sh with stack-aware config pre-fill logic
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create plugins/dso/scripts/prefill-config.sh — a standalone script that:
1. Reads detect-stack.sh output to determine the project stack
2. Looks up per-stack defaults from an internal associative array (Python, Node/JS, Ruby)
3. For each of commands.test_runner, commands.lint, commands.format, commands.format_check:
   a. Read existing value from dso-config.conf (if present)
   b. If non-empty: emit [DSO INFO] commands.<key> already set — skipping
   c. If empty or absent: write the stack-appropriate default
4. Stacks without defined defaults (Rust, unknown) write empty string with inline comment

Per-stack defaults (derive from Epics A/B when available; use known-good defaults for now):
- Python: test_runner=pytest, lint=ruff check ., format=ruff format ., format_check=ruff format --check .
- Node/JS: test_runner=npx jest, lint=npx eslint ., format=npx prettier --write ., format_check=npx prettier --check .
- Ruby: test_runner=bundle exec rspec, lint=bundle exec rubocop, format=bundle exec rubocop -A, format_check=bundle exec rubocop --format simple

Set executable bit. Register in dso shim if needed.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/prefill-config.sh (CREATE)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/prefill-config.sh
- [ ] Script reads detect-stack.sh output and writes correct defaults for Node/JS stack
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/unit/scripts/test-prefill-config.sh
- [ ] RED markers removed from .test-index after tests pass
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test_node_prefill\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — Files: plugins/dso/scripts/prefill-config.sh (created), tests updated. All 6 tests GREEN.
comments.author: Test
